summary: A narrated corporate slideshow recapping USCIS work during Trump's first 100 days: title cards, a clip of Trump signing an executive order, B-roll of the USCIS building and a fingerprint/biometric station, and a closing USCIS.gov card. It is a straightforward voiceover-driven informational recap with no music track, stylized genre treatment, or youth-appeal spectacle.
notable_text: President Trump's First 100 Days: Shaping Immigration Policy; USCIS.gov
